## Province

## Proposed primary-source citation

The `verification_status` column promotes from PARTIAL to CONFIRMED only when a named primary legal instrument is cited. Please include:

- **Document type:** Royal Decree / Royal Gazette publication / Revolutionary Council Announcement / Act of Parliament / other (specify)
- **Document title:** (in Thai with English translation if helpful)
- **Volume / issue / page:** (Royal Gazette specifics)
- **Publication date:**
- **Effective date:**
- **URL or archival reference:** (Wikisource transcription, ratchakitcha.soc.go.th archive page, or scanned PDF link)

## Verification chain

Briefly describe how the cited document confirms the establishment year. Quote the relevant text if accessible (Thai or English).
